headline: FDA clears Penumbra’s Thunderbolt thrombectomy platform for stroke
summary: Penumbra’s computer assisted vacuum thrombectomy platform uses aspiration for clot removal during acute ischemic stroke treatment.

headline: Boston Scientific: The Market Is Pricing A Broken Compounder-We See A Reset One
summary: Boston Scientific stock plunged ~53% on guidance cuts and WATCHMAN/EP issues, but trades cheap vs. peers. Click here to read my analysis on Boston Scientific.

headline: Penumbra’s FDA nod for clot removal tech a win for Boston Scientific
summary: The stroke treatment could contribute about $100 million in incremental revenue over time to Boston Scientific, the buyer of Penumbra, one analyst said.
